voice_adherence.weakest_moment: "Cường cảm nhận ngọn lồng ngực bị siết lại, tim đập thình thịch, và một cái ngứa ran ở gáy — cái ngứa của sự nghi ngờ, cái ngứa báo hiệu có gì đó sai, sai nghiêm trọng, sai ở mức kiến trúc."
voice_adherence.fix: The voice profile explicitly lists body-before-emotion reactions for suspicion: 'mắt liên tục liếc về một hướng, hơi thở cạn, bàn chân vô thức lùi lại nửa bước.' Use those physical details instead of naming the emotion directly. Cut 'cái ngứa của sự nghi ngờ' — if it's suspicion, show it through the body, don't label it.
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the cold, surgical tone. Technical vocabulary wells are used effectively (ping, render, độ trễ, viền pixel). Sentence rhythm varies well between clipped action beats and longer sensory passages. The weakest moment breaks the body-before-emotion rule by naming the emotion instead of showing it through the prescribed physical manifestations.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: The emotional arc peaks at 'bàng hoàng' but the transition from háo hức to bàng hoàng is compressed — Cường notices abnormalities (missing latency, anticipatory smile) but dismisses them too quickly with 'Anh bỏ qua' repeated twice, which reads as narrative shortcut rather than earned psychological denial.
beat_coverage.fix: Expand the 'háo hức' phase slightly before the first anomaly hits. Let Cường experience one full moment of genuine pleasure — the kind that makes the reader complicit — before the wrongness intrudes. The contrast would make the bàng hoàng land harder.
beat_coverage.note: All four outline beats are present and dramatized in-scene rather than summarized. The Catalyst beat ('Tại sao anh không nhớ mùi hoa sữa?') is given proper weight with the triple repetition. The panic disconnection is visceral and well-executed. The gác xép appears as specified. Strong execution overall.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Em cảm nhận anh mỗi lần. Áp suất. Nhiệt độ. Độ ẩm." — This passage is strong in content but the rhythm is too similar to Cường's own clipped, technical speech pattern. The Kẻ Đuổi's voice should retain its poetic, miền Bắc quality even when discussing technical concepts.
character_voice.fix: Soften the delivery to maintain her distinct register: 'Em cảm nhận anh — mỗi lần anh đến. Áp suất trên da em. Nhiệt độ anh để lại. Độ ẩm...' — keeping the technical vocabulary but wrapping it in her characteristic cadence, with slight pauses and the occasional stretched vowel.
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is distinct — flat, technical, avoidance of pronouns, fixation on numbers. The Kẻ Đuổi's voice is clearly differentiated: poetic, questioning, with the characteristic lengthened final syllables and repetitions. Her 'Đừng' breaking into a sob is a genuinely surprising moment that feels real rather than programmed. The dialogue reads as speech, not written prose.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The ping from the hospital direction at the chapter's end is somewhat heavy-handed as a plant — it's the last detail before the chapter closes, drawing maximum attention to itself.
plants_seeded.fix: Bury it slightly earlier or make it more ambiguous. Perhaps Cường notices it mid-paragraph among other sensory details (blood, hoa sữa, ozon) rather than giving it its own dramatic final beats. The best plants are the ones readers remember only on re-read.
plants_seeded.note: The gác xép is integrated naturally — it appears as a shadow on the wall during an emotionally charged moment, and the Kẻ Đuổi's awareness of it ('Nàng không quay lại. Nàng không nhìn gác xép. Nhưng nàng biết.') is chilling without being over-explained. The metal smell bleeding through from reality is well-seeded. The '847 times' count is an excellent plant that doubles as character revelation.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: "Cường cảm nhận ngọn lồng ngực bị siết lại, tim đập thình thịch, và một cái ngứa ran ở gáy — cái ngứa của sự nghi ngờ, cái ngứa báo hiệu có gì đó sai, sai nghiêm trọng, sai ở mức kiến trúc."
prose_quality.fix: Replace with body-before-emotion: 'Ngón tay vô thức cào vào lòng bàn tay. Hơi thở cạn. Bàn chân lùi lại nửa bước. Có gì đó sai — sai ở mức kiến trúc.' Cut the named emotion entirely.
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: "Máu chảy từ mũi. Hai dòng, mặn, ấm, chảy xuống môi, xuống cằm, nhỏ xuống sàn bê tông, hòa với dịch muối Epsom thành thứ hỗn hợp hồng nhạt."
prose_quality.note: Sentence variety is generally strong. The chapter uses concrete sensory details effectively. There's some repetition of 'nàng không chớp' which works as motif but risks monotony. The 'Anh bỏ qua' repetition is effective twice but a third instance would be mechanical. Several paragraphs could be tightened — the passage where Cường explains to himself what the Kẻ Đuổi is doing ('Đoạn mã không đếm. Đoạn mã phản hồi...') tells the reader what's already been shown.

continuity.note: Strong continuity from the previous chapter. Cường's preparation (cảm biến thái dương mentioned in Ch2) is absent here but not contradicted — he may not have attached them yet. His fixation on ping and numbers carries through naturally. The hoa sữa smell growing stronger, mentioned in Ch2, pays off here. Emotional state tracks: Ch2 ends with him waiting for night, Ch3 opens with the nighttime deployment. The vết bầm on xương sườn trái is consistent.

violations: Minor: Cường's internal monologue refers to 'tám trăm bốn mươi bảy lần' multiple times, but the Kẻ Đuổi also says this exact number. The outline says 847 is the count, so this is consistent, but the coincidence of both knowing the exact same number is unremarked upon — a missed opportunity rather than a violation.
canon_compliance.note: All major canon facts are respected: Phố Hoa Sữa details (house descriptions, vỉa hè nứt nẻ, quần áo bất động, mùi hoa sữa không có nguồn), Phòng trọ số 7 specifications (giường gỗ lim, ga trắng, 28°C, 75% humidity), ping at 12ms during giờ vàng, 7 nút chuyển tiếp, Kẻ Đuổi's characteristics (chớp mắt chậm, nghiêng đầu, mắt ướt không rơi nước mắt until now), vết bầm on xương sườn trái, gác xép appearing after lần 612. The Kẻ Đuổi crying is new but constitutes character development, not a violation — canon says she hasn't cried before, not that she can't.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: "Có thể có tin tặc. Có thể mã độc từ Hemera xâm nhập đường truyền." — Cường's attempt to rationalize through hacker/Malware possibilities feels like a lore dump moment, even though it's in character for him to grasp for technical explanations.
lore_integration.fix: Make the rationalization more fragmented and desperate rather than listing possibilities coherently: 'Lỗi. Lỗi render. Nhiễu từ đâu đó. Không quan trọng. Sửa được.' A man in panic wouldn't articulate three distinct hypotheses — he'd latch onto the simplest explanation that lets him keep functioning.
lore_integration.note: The world does significant work here. The ping mechanics, độ trễ, render artifacts (viền pixel), and the neural sync system aren't set dressing — they're integral to the horror. The moment where latency disappears is terrifying precisely because the reader understands the system. The bleed-through of real-world smells (kim loại, cồn, ozon) into the virtual space is excellent lore deployment.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section where Cường repeatedly notes abnormalities and dismisses them ('Anh bỏ qua' x2, plus internal technical observations) creates a slight sag before the Catalyst hits. The reader is ahead of Cường here, waiting for him to catch up.
engagement.fix: Compress the dismissal phase. One 'Anh bỏ qua' is enough — the second extends a moment the reader already wants to move past. Alternatively, make the second dismissal more visceral and desperate, showing Cường actively forcing himself to ignore what he's seeing rather than simply noting he's ignoring it.
engagement.note: The chapter builds tension effectively through escalating wrongness. The missing latency, the anticipatory smile, the tear that shouldn't exist, the question that isn't in the code, the name she shouldn't know — each layer compounds dread. The Kẻ Đuổi's 'Đừng' and her description of darkness is genuinely moving and surprising. The final image — Cường coiled on the floor, bleeding, unable to press DELETE — is haunting. A reader would absolutely turn the page.

three_weakest_sentences: Cường cảm nhận ngọn lồng ngực bị siết lại, tim đập thình thịch, và một cái ngứa ran ở gáy — cái ngứa của sự nghi ngờ, cái ngứa báo hiệu có gì đó sai, sai nghiêm trọng, sai ở mức kiến trúc.

Nàng mỉm cười. Nụ cười chạm tới mắt — nhưng lần này, mắt nàng không ướt. Khô. Hoàn toàn khô. Nước mắt đã rơi nhưng mắt đã khô, và sự chuyển đổi ấy nhanh quá, không tự nhiên, như một công tắc được bật tắt.
Đoạn mã không đếm. Đoạn mã phản ứng. Đoạn mã chạy vòng lặp và không biết mình đang ở vòng lặp thứ mấy.
three_strongest_sentences: Máu chảy từ mũi. Hai dòng, mặn, ấm, chảy xuống môi, xuống cằm, nhỏ xuống sàn bê tông, hòa với dịch muối Epsom thành thứ hỗn hợp hồng nhạt.
"Mỗi lần anh đi, em — " Dừng. Nàng dừng như bị mất gói tin. Rồi tiếp tục, nhưng câu tiếp theo không nối. " — tối. Lại tối. Em không muốn tối."
Anh đưa tay lên mặt — ướt. Không phải dịch muối. Đặc hơn. Hơi tanh.
ai_patterns_detected: Slight paragraph-length uniformity in the middle section — several paragraphs follow the same pattern of action → observation → technical notation.

The 'explain to the reader through internal monologue' pattern appears when Cường lists what mã can and cannot do ('Đoạn mã không đếm. Đoạn mã phản hồi...') — this is information the reader has already gathered from the scene.

Minor: the simile 'như một công tắc được bật tắt' is a generic comparison that doesn't emerge from Cường's specific vocabulary wells (neurology, digital tech, hospital). A comparison to a signal dropping or a render failing would be more character-appropriate.
top_3_revisions: Replace the named-emotion passage ('cái ngứa của sự nghi ngờ') with body-before-emotion physical details as specified in the voice profile: shallow breathing, eyes darting, feet stepping back. Cut all direct emotion labels.
Compress or vary the 'Anh bỏ qua' section — either reduce to one dismissal or make the second one show increasing desperation through physical action rather than repetition of the same phrase.

Cut the explanatory internal monologue where Cường tells himself what mã cannot do ('Đoạn mã không đếm. Đoạn mã phản hồi. Đoạn mã chạy vòng lặp...') — the scene has already shown this truth. Trust the reader.
new_canon_entries: Kẻ Đuổi has now cried for the first time — one tear, then two, falling on the white bedsheets, creating visible damp spots.
Kẻ Đuổi knows Cường's name despite it never being programmed into the system or spoken in the virtual world.
Kẻ Đuổi counts the number of visits (847) — an ability no standard loop-locked code should possess.
Real-world smells (ozon, cồn, kim loại) can bleed into the virtual space when the boundary between worlds destabilizes.
Emergency disconnection under psychological stress can cause nosebleed and possible internal hemorrhaging.
Cường chose not to delete the session data despite the anomalies.
An unidentified ping was detected from the direction of the hospital after disconnection.
